nodes.label: PinkFox Brentwood Website
nodes.rationale: A soft-luxe website for PinkFox, a Brentwood beauty studio offering lashes, hair and nails.

nodes.label: Tech Stack (Next.js, Tailwind v4, GSAP, Lenis, Splitting.js, Swiper)
nodes.rationale: Built with Next.js, Tailwind v4, GSAP + Lenis smooth scroll, Splitting.js heading animations and a Swiper testimonials carousel.
nodes.norm_label: tech stack (next.js, tailwind v4, gsap, lenis, splitting.js, swiper)

nodes.label: site.ts Editable Config
nodes.rationale: src/lib/site.ts holds all editable content: WhatsApp number, Facebook link, hours, area, services and the gallery object.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Integration
nodes.rationale: whatsappNumber powers every 'Book on WhatsApp' button and the floating chat button. Currently a placeholder.

nodes.label: Facebook Integration
nodes.rationale: socials.facebook is the live page link; the salon's own Facebook photos can replace the placeholder images.

nodes.label: Image-Swap Workflow
nodes.rationale: AI-generated placeholder images live in public/gallery/{beauty,hair,nails} and public/hero; real photos are dropped in and listed in the gallery object in site.ts, and the grid/tabs/lightbox pick them up automatically.

nodes.label: Site Sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, Gallery, About, Testimonials, Footer)
nodes.rationale: components/site contains Navbar, Hero, Services, Gallery, About, Testimonials, Footer, WhatsAppButton, Reveal.
nodes.norm_label: site sections (navbar, hero, services, gallery, about, testimonials, footer)

nodes.label: Hero Portrait - Soft Glam Beauty Editorial
nodes.rationale: Editorial portrait of a model with full lashes, glossy nude lips and soft glam makeup, faux magazine masthead text ('CEATGUNA') at base.
nodes.norm_label: hero portrait - soft glam beauty editorial

nodes.label: Beauty 1 - Pink Eyeshadow & Volume Lashes Close-Up
nodes.rationale: Close-up of an eye with dramatic volume false lashes, pink eyeshadow and blush.
nodes.norm_label: beauty 1 - pink eyeshadow & volume lashes close-up

nodes.label: Beauty 2 - Fluffy Brows & Lashes Close-Up
nodes.rationale: Close-up of fluffy laminated brows, full lashes and rosy blush makeup.

nodes.label: Beauty 3 - Vogue-Style Glam Makeup Cover
nodes.rationale: Faux Vogue magazine cover with a model in soft glam makeup, full brows and lashes.

nodes.label: Hair 1 - Glossy Waves Styling (Vogue Cover)
nodes.rationale: Faux Vogue cover showing a stylist working on long glossy wavy brunette hair in a salon.

nodes.label: Hair 2 - Blonde Balayage Waves (Vogue Cover)
nodes.rationale: Faux Vogue cover of voluminous blonde balayage curls photographed from behind in a salon.

nodes.label: Hair 3 - Brunette Layered Bob Blowout
nodes.rationale: Glossy brunette layered bob blowout shot from behind in a salon, with stylised overlay text and a 'Saare' faux logo.

nodes.label: Nails 1 - Nude Almond Set with White Floral Art
nodes.rationale: Almond-shaped nude/pink manicure with tiny white daisy floral nail art on satin.
nodes.norm_label: nails 1 - nude almond set with white floral art

nodes.label: Nails 2 - French Tips with Pink Floral Accents
nodes.rationale: Almond white French manicure with small pink flower accents on satin.
nodes.norm_label: nails 2 - french tips with pink floral accents

nodes.label: Nails 3 - Chrome/Metallic French Tip Long Set
nodes.rationale: Long square chrome/metallic copper-bronze French tip nails on nude base.
nodes.norm_label: nails 3 - chrome/metallic french tip long set
